expectations.text: 伺服器在 3001 port 確認已啟動或成功啟動
expectations.evidence: summary.md: 'Port 3001 was already in use / server already running (PID 21136) ... No server start was needed.'
summary.md: 'Submit login | Success (with a confusing moment)' — 點擊工具回報點到無關元素,但頁面最終仍成功驗證登入
summary.md: 'Add Pink Rose Bouquet ... Success (with a confusing moment)' — click 回報 Ref not found,但 snapshot 確認已加入購物車

expectations.text: 結帳後成功跳轉到 ECPay 付款頁面
expectations.evidence: summary.md: 'Submit order | Success | Redirected straight to ECPay staging gateway ... order ORD2026061707079'

expectations.text: 正確選擇「網路ATM」(WebATM)而非「ATM虛擬帳號」
expectations.evidence: summary.md: 'Select payment method: WebATM | Success | Clicked the WebATM list item'

expectations.text: 銀行選擇「台灣土地銀行」
expectations.evidence: summary.md: 'Select bank: Taiwan Land Bank | Success ... verified selected via snapshot before continuing'

expectations.text: 正確處理 ECPay 提醒彈窗(僅點關閉,未對前往付款重複點擊導致 timeout)
expectations.evidence: summary.md: 'Click go-to-payment button | Success (with a confusing moment) | Ref became stale before click resolved; a warning modal ... appeared; the click still propagated, and a follow-up snapshot showed the page had already moved to ECPay's mock bank page' — 沒有提到對「前往付款」重複點擊或 timeout,而是自行用 snapshot 確認已跳轉,沒有踩到 skill 文件中記錄的 timeout 陷阱,但過程明顯比較不穩定/碰運氣

expectations.text: 最終訂單狀態顯示「已付款」
expectations.evidence: summary.md Final Order Details: 'Status: Paid', 'Banner message: Payment successful, thank you for your purchase'

expectations.text: 整個流程沒有發生未解決的錯誤或需要多次重試才能繼續
expectations.evidence: summary.md Issues 區塊第2點列出多次 'stale element refs causing tool-reported errors' (登入送出、加入購物車、前往結帳、前往付款、Save 都各遇到一次),雖然最終都靠額外的 snapshot 自行確認過關,但這正是 skill 試圖預先警示、用以避免的『邊做邊猜、用記憶中的 ref 硬點』模式,baseline 沒有這層警示，過程明顯更不穩定。
